page_metadata.biotools__summary: Genome-wide Microsatellite Analyzing Tool Package (GMATA) integrates SSR mining, statistical analysis and plotting, marker design, polymorphism screening and marker transferability, and enabled simultaneously display SSR markers with other genome features.
